priority_matrix.item: R01: Fix 182 quote-style lint errors across 6 files
R02: Remove dead unused Connection class from lib/connection.js
R03: Fix isObject null bug in lib/util.js (isObject(null) returns true)
R04: Fix stray quote in test/query.js expected URL template literal
R05: Remove purposeless OptionHelper constructor wrapper in lib/optionhelper.js
R06: Extract getHeader utility to eliminate duplicated header access in lib/http.js
R07: Consolidate four URL methods via private _urlRequest helper in lib/api.js
R08: Remove _queryHandler from module.exports in lib/api.js
R09: Replace hardcoded OAuth revoke URLs with configurable constants
R10: Replace let self = this with arrow functions in lib/fdcstream.js
R11: Replace arguments.length dispatch in Record.set with type inspection
R12: Move respToJson definition above its call site in lib/api.js
R13: Remove unused singleProp: 'type' configuration from getLimits
R14: Deprecate the stream alias method in lib/api.js
R15: Remove empty beforeEach hook and implement stub test cases
R16: Fix non-existent client.logout() call in test/integration.js
R17: Remove stale v54.0 hardcoded fallback from lib/constants.js
R18: Consolidate getIdentity redundant null-guard chain in lib/api.js

implementation_sequence.item: R01: Fix 182 quote-style lint errors across 6 files
implementation_sequence.rationale: CI-blocking issue; run eslint --fix for a deterministic zero-risk pass before any other change so subsequent diffs are readable

implementation_sequence.item: R04: Fix stray quote in test/query.js expected URL template literal
implementation_sequence.rationale: Exposes a silently false-passing test assertion; fix early so the test suite accurately reflects library behavior before structural changes begin

implementation_sequence.item: R03: Fix isObject null bug in lib/util.js (isObject(null) returns true)
implementation_sequence.rationale: Latent defect in a utility used by all API methods; fix and add unit test before any refactoring touches _getOpts or dependent code

implementation_sequence.item: R02: Remove dead unused Connection class from lib/connection.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pure dead code removal with no functional impact; clean up early to eliminate confusion about which Connection definition is authoritative

implementation_sequence.item: R17: Remove stale v54.0 hardcoded fallback from lib/constants.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Simple single-line removal; part of R09 constants cleanup; do early to reduce diff noise when R09 adds new constants

implementation_sequence.item: R15: Remove empty beforeEach hook and implement stub test cases
implementation_sequence.rationale: Test hygiene; safe to apply at any point; do before structural refactoring so test coverage is meaningful during changes

implementation_sequence.item: R16: Fix non-existent client.logout() call in test/integration.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Latent bug fix; no functional impact on current test run since integration tests are always skipped

implementation_sequence.item: R13: Remove unused singleProp: 'type' configuration from getLimits
implementation_sequence.rationale: Trivial dead configuration removal; apply before refactoring the surrounding API method group

implementation_sequence.item: R12: Move respToJson definition above its call site in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pure reordering with no semantic change; best applied before R07/R08 which modify the same region of lib/api.js

implementation_sequence.item: R05: Remove purposeless OptionHelper constructor wrapper in lib/optionhelper.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Foundational cleanup of the HTTP pipeline module; apply before R06 which adds to util.js and before R07 which touches api.js

implementation_sequence.item: R06: Extract getHeader utility to eliminate duplicated header access in lib/http.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Adds a utility function that improves lib/http.js readability; isolated change with no cascading effects

implementation_sequence.item: R08: Remove _queryHandler from module.exports in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Reduces public API surface; apply before R07 to keep the module.exports changes separate and easier to review

implementation_sequence.item: R09: Replace hardcoded OAuth revoke URLs with configurable constants
implementation_sequence.rationale: Affects lib/constants.js (adds new fields) and lib/auth.js; apply after constants module is stable from R17

implementation_sequence.item: R07: Consolidate four URL methods via private _urlRequest helper in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Highest-complexity change; apply after module.exports cleanup (R08) so the exports diff is clean; verify with full test suite

implementation_sequence.item: R10: Replace let self = this with arrow functions in lib/fdcstream.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Self-contained change to fdcstream.js; apply after core API changes are stable to keep streaming changes isolated

implementation_sequence.item: R11: Replace arguments.length dispatch in Record.set with type inspection
implementation_sequence.rationale: Self-contained change to record.js; apply after API layer changes are complete and test suite is stable

implementation_sequence.item: R18: Consolidate getIdentity redundant null-guard chain in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Low-priority readability improvement; apply last in api.js changes to minimize diff churn

implementation_sequence.item: R14: Deprecate the stream alias method in lib/api.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Documentation-only change (adds @deprecated JSDoc and README note); apply last as it requires coordinating with changelog and release notes
